prompt: A cinematic tennis advertising campaign in a 3-panel collage layout (1:1), featuring a top wide hero shot and two smaller panels below. Ultra-premium sports editorial aesthetic with high contrast lighting, sharp shadows, and clean studio setup. Subject: Elite female tennis athlete with a strong, defined athletic build. Wearing a deep crimson performance crop top and structured white pleated skirt, paired with modern performance sneakers. Hair tied back in a dynamic ponytail. Sweat glow and subtle skin highlights for realism. Environment: Minimal off-white studio background with a glossy reflective floor. Subtle gradient lighting with soft falloff. Clean, distraction-free composition. --- 🔺 TOP PANEL — HERO ACTION Dynamic forehand swing captured mid-motion, tennis ball frozen in air. Powerful stance with visible muscle tension. Diagonal bold red graphic stripe cutting across the floor Subtle motion blur trails behind racket for energy Typography (large, editorial): “BUILT FOR THE BREAKPOINT” “BUILT FOR” → black brushstroke style “THE BREAKPOINT” → bold condensed red sans-serif Micro UI stats (minimal, right side): Precision 99.8% Reaction 100% Control 100% --- 🔻 BOTTOM LEFT PANEL — POWER POSE Athlete standing confidently with one foot resting on tennis racket, scattered tennis balls around. Typography: “OWN YOUR COURT” “OWN YOUR” → bold black “COURT” → expressive red brushstroke Subtext (small): Composure wins matches. --- 🔻 BOTTOM RIGHT PANEL — FOCUS MODE Athlete seated on a white cube, elbows on knees, intense forward gaze. Racket leaning beside. Subtle geometric line accents in background. Typography: “PRESSURE CREATES CHAMPIONS” “PRESSURE” → bold red “CREATES CHAMPIONS” → clean black sans-serif Small UI metrics (clean minimal): Focus 100% Discipline 100% Endurance 100% --- 🎨 Design Style Modern sports editorial (Nike / Apple hybrid aesthetic) Ultra-clean composition with strong negative space Color palette: Red (#FF2A2A), White, Black Sharp shadows + high contrast lighting Premium magazine layout Subtle reflections on floor Minimal but intentional UI overlays --- ⚡ Optional Enhancer ultra realistic, high detail, 4k, product design showcase, global illumination, soft shadows, cinematic lighting, depth of field, premium sports branding, sharp typography
